title: Fuel Rail Pressure Too Low
meaning: Fuel rail/system pressure below spec — hard start; power loss; limp mode common
likely_causes: clogged fuel filter|weak lift pump|air in fuel|failing rail pressure sensor|SCV/fuel metering issue
checks: replace primary fuel filter first|verify lift pump primes at key-on|inspect suction lines for air leaks|check rail pressure sensor connector
fixes: replace fuel filter|bleed fuel system|test/replace lift pump|diagnose SCV/rail sensor per service manual
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Range/Performance
meaning: ECU sees erratic fuel rail pressure readings
likely_causes: failing rail pressure sensor|clogged fuel filter|weak lift pump|wiring/5V reference issue
checks: check fuel filter age|wiggle-test sensor connector|verify 5V reference and ground|compare commanded vs actual rail pressure if tool available
fixes: replace fuel filter|repair harness|replace rail pressure sensor
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: NOx Sensor Signal Out of Range
meaning: NOx sensor bank 1 signal out of range — common regen/DEF trigger
likely_causes: dirty or failed NOx sensor|damaged NOx wiring|exhaust leaks upstream of sensor
checks: inspect NOx connector for corrosion|check harness near heat shields|look for exhaust leaks before sensor
fixes: repair harness|replace NOx sensor|clear codes after repair and verify regen completes
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: SCR NOx Catalyst Efficiency Below Threshold
meaning: SCR system reports poor NOx conversion efficiency
likely_causes: failed NOx sensor|clogged DEF injector|poor DEF quality|crystallized DEF lines
checks: verify DEF level and freshness (32.5% urea)|inspect DEF injector for crystals|check NOx sensors before condemning catalyst
fixes: replace DEF|clean/replace DEF injector|replace NOx sensor|dealer laptop may be needed for forced regen
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: SCR Inducement Engine Derate
meaning: Emissions inducement has cut engine power — usually secondary to another SCR/DEF fault
likely_causes: unresolved DEF/SCR fault (P20EE/P2201/etc)|low DEF|failed NOx or DEF pump
checks: read active codes first — fix root SCR/DEF code|check DEF level/quality|confirm no active NOx communication faults
fixes: repair root emissions fault|top off fresh DEF|complete parked regen if required|clear inducement after repair
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Lost Communication With NOx Sensor A
meaning: ECU cannot communicate with NOx sensor A
likely_causes: open/short in NOx harness|failed NOx sensor|connector corrosion|low system voltage
checks: check battery voltage first|inspect NOx connector pins|continuity-test power/ground/CAN lines to sensor
fixes: repair wiring|clean/replace connector|replace NOx sensor
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: CAN Bus Off
meaning: Control module communication bus A off — multiple random electrical codes possible
likely_causes: weak battery|poor ground|damaged CAN harness|single module flooding bus
checks: load-test battery (12.6V+ resting)|clean main grounds|inspect harness at boom/frame pivots|scan for module-specific U-codes
fixes: charge/replace battery|repair CAN wiring|isolate failing module
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Atmospheric Pressure Sensor Low
meaning: Barometric/atmospheric pressure sensor circuit low
likely_causes: failed MAP/baro sensor|open circuit|connector corrosion
checks: inspect sensor connector|check 5V reference|compare baro reading to local altitude expectation
fixes: repair harness|replace atmospheric pressure sensor
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Coolant Temperature Sensor Low
meaning: Engine coolant temperature sensor circuit low / implausible cold reading
likely_causes: failed ECT sensor|open circuit|thermostat stuck open (related symptom)
checks: check coolant level|inspect ECT connector|compare gauge vs scan tool temp
fixes: repair harness|replace coolant temperature sensor|replace thermostat if confirmed
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: AdBlue / DEF Quality
meaning: DEF quality out of range
likely_causes: old or contaminated DEF|DEF quality sensor fault|wrong fluid in tank
checks: confirm DEF is 32.5% urea|drain/replace contaminated fluid|inspect quality sensor connector
fixes: replace DEF|service/replace quality sensor|flush crystallized lines if needed
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Throttle Position Fault
meaning: Throttle position sensor out of range
likely_causes: worn TP sensor|5V reference issue|binding throttle linkage
checks: sweep TP volts through pedal/lever travel|verify 5V and ground|inspect linkage for binding
fixes: replace TP sensor|repair harness|free/lubricate linkage per manual
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Transmission Pressure Low
meaning: Main transmission pressure below spec
likely_causes: low transmission oil|suction leak|worn charge pump|pressure sensor fault
checks: check oil level/grade hot and cold|inspect suction for air|compare pressure to spec if gauge available
fixes: top up correct oil|fix suction leak|replace pump or sensor as diagnosed
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Coolant Temp High
meaning: Engine over-temperature warning
likely_causes: blocked radiator|failed fan/relay|low coolant|failed temp sensor
checks: infrared scan radiator core|verify fan command|check coolant level and cap
fixes: clean radiator core|replace fan/relay|repair cooling system leaks
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Transmission Output Speed Sensor No Signal
meaning: TCU has no output speed signal — erratic shift or limp gear
likely_causes: failed output speed sensor|open harness|connector corrosion
checks: inspect sensor and connector at transmission|check for damaged wiring at articulation points
fixes: repair harness|replace output speed sensor
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Forward High Solenoid Circuit Open
meaning: Open circuit to forward high solenoid
likely_causes: failed solenoid coil|broken wire|poor connector
checks: check solenoid resistance vs spec|wiggle-test connector|inspect harness chafe points
fixes: replace solenoid|repair wiring
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Transmission Oil Temperature High
meaning: Transmission oil overheating
likely_causes: low/dirty oil|blocked cooler|extreme load|failed temp sensor
checks: check transmission oil level|inspect cooler fins/lines|allow cool-down before continued work
fixes: top up/change oil|clean cooler|replace temp sensor if false reading
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Powershift System Pressure Low
meaning: Not enough hydraulic pressure to engage powershift clutches
likely_causes: low transmission fluid|weak charge pump|pressure sensor fault
checks: verify fluid level first|inspect for external leaks|check charge pressure if equipped
fixes: top up fluid|repair leaks|diagnose pump/sensor
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Transmission Disconnect Error
meaning: Transmission disengaged or controller detected disconnect — machine may not move
likely_causes: neutral cutout switch misadjusted/failed|TCU communication fault|low transmission fluid|clutch pressure issue
checks: check neutral cutout switch adjustment|verify transmission fluid level|inspect TCU wiring
fixes: adjust/replace neutral cutout switch|repair TCU harness|service transmission as needed
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Engine Oil Pressure Low
meaning: Oil pressure below safe threshold — power may be reduced
likely_causes: low oil level|clogged oil filter|failed oil pressure sensor|worn oil pump
checks: check oil level immediately|inspect for leaks|verify sensor connector before condemning pump
fixes: top off oil|replace oil filter|replace sensor or pump as diagnosed
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Fuel System Fault
meaning: Fuel system fault — rough run; power loss; or no-start
likely_causes: clogged fuel filter|air in fuel|weak lift pump|contaminated fuel
checks: replace fuel filter first|listen for lift pump at key-on|check tank for water/debris
fixes: replace fuel filter|bleed system|test/replace lift pump
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Regen Required / Regen Incomplete
meaning: Machine requesting or failing parked/active regeneration
likely_causes: soot load high|failed NOx/DEF components|operator interrupting regen|exhaust temp too low
checks: do not ignore — complete parked regen when safe|check DEF level|scan for related SCR/NOx codes
fixes: complete parked regen|repair root SCR/DEF fault|replace NOx/DEF parts as diagnosed
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures

title: Engine Derate Active
meaning: Engine power limited by ECU protection or emissions inducement
likely_causes: active derate/inducement code|overheat|low oil pressure|SCR countdown
checks: read active codes — derate is usually a symptom|address root code first
fixes: fix root fault|clear codes after repair|verify power restored
provenance: Field starter; confirm with official procedures
